name: Black Walnut Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease and lightly flour a 9-inch tube pan.
2. Cream the butter until light and fluffy.
3. Gradually add the powdered sugar, beating until light and creamy.
4. Add the eggs one at a time, beating until light and creamy.
5. Alternately add the flour, water, and vanilla, beating until smooth and light.
6. Fold in the chopped black walnuts.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
8. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour, or until a tester inserted comes out clean. Do not overbake; otherwise, it will be dry.
9. Serves 12 to 16
